## 3dslibris 2.3.1

This release is a focused stability update on top of `2.3.0`.

### Highlights

- Fixed a crash when switching directly from one open book to another from the reader.
- Added better recovery for failed opens, so the app returns cleanly to the library instead of getting stuck on `opening book ...`.
- Improved EPUB compatibility by decoding common HTML named entities such as accented characters written as entities.
- Fixed browser-to-reader visual artifacts that could remain on screen when opening a book.

### Included fixes and behavior changes

- Reader/book handoff is stricter during switch-book flow, with session-aware logging for stale async work.
- Browser frames stop as soon as a book open starts, avoiding overlap with the new parse path.

### Included assets

- `3dslibris.cia`
- `3dslibris-debug.cia`
- `3dslibris.3dsx`
- `3dslibris-debug.3dsx`
- `3dslibris-sdmc.zip`
- `3dslibris-source.tar.gz`
